title: Devi - Ek Pretmanobir Panchali
overview: Years ago, there lived a witch called Maya in the dense forest of Kalbuni. She dreamt of being the most powerful witch in the universe. To fulfil her dream, she started the process of summoning the dark lord 'Pishach'. She started kidnapping the new born girls from nearby villages and offered them to the 'mighty fire'.
